title: Authors and Citation
text: Claudio Zanettini. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Zanettini C (2026). rgsrs: Query FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API. R package version 0.1.0, https://c1au6i0.github.io/rgsrs/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {rgsrs: Query the FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API},   author = {Claudio Zanettini},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://c1au6i0.github.io/rgsrs/}, }

what: Query the FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API
title: Query the FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API
text: Tidy R client FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) REST API. Retrieve substance metadata, synonyms, cross-reference codes (CAS, PubChem, ChEMBL, -ATC, …), chemical structure information 170 000+ registered substances. API key required.

title: Query the FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("c1au6i0/rgsrs")

title: Query the FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API
text: functions accept verbose argument (default TRUE) return tidy data frames query column tracking input identifier. Failed lookups return NULL warning rather throwing error.
code: library(rgsrs)  # Search gsrs_search("aspirin", top = 5)  # Fetch by UNII (aspirin = R16CO5Y76E) gsrs_substance("R16CO5Y76E")  # All synonyms gsrs_names("R16CO5Y76E")  # Cross-references – all systems gsrs_codes("R16CO5Y76E")  # Cross-references – CAS only gsrs_codes("R16CO5Y76E", code_system = "CAS")  # Name → UNII gsrs_unii_from_name(c("aspirin", "ibuprofen"))  # Chemical structure info by name gsrs_chem_info(c("aspirin", "ibuprofen"), type = "name")  # Chemical structure info by CAS number gsrs_chem_info(c("50-78-2", "15687-27-1"), type = "cas")  # Chemical structure info by UNII gsrs_chem_info("R16CO5Y76E", type = "unii")  # Chemical structure info by InChIKey gsrs_chem_info("BSYNRYMUTXBXSQ-UHFFFAOYSA-N", type = "inchikey")  # Chemical structure info by SMILES (exact match) gsrs_chem_info("CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O", type = "smiles")  # Everything at once out <- gsrs_all("R16CO5Y76E") str(out, max.level = 1)

title: Query the FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) API
text: MIT © 2026 Claudio Zanettini

what: Retrieve comprehensive GSRS data for a set of UNIIs — gsrs_all
title: Retrieve comprehensive GSRS data for a set of UNIIs — gsrs_all
text: Convenience wrapper calls gsrs_substance(), gsrs_names(), gsrs_codes(), gsrs_structure(), gsrs_hierarchy() sequence returns named list containing five data frames. sub-function uses with_graceful_exit internally, partial failures return NULL element without aborting whole call.

title: Retrieve comprehensive GSRS data for a set of UNIIs — gsrs_all
code: gsrs_all(unii, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Retrieve comprehensive GSRS data for a set of UNIIs — gsrs_all
text: unii Character vector one UNII codes. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve comprehensive GSRS data for a set of UNIIs — gsrs_all
text: named list five elements: substance Data frame gsrs_substance(). names Data frame gsrs_names(). codes Data frame gsrs_codes(). structure Data frame gsrs_structure(). hierarchy Data frame gsrs_hierarchy(). Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve comprehensive GSRS data for a set of UNIIs — gsrs_all
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_all("R16CO5Y76E")  # aspirin #> ℹ Fetching substance for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Fetching names for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved 64 name record(s). #> ℹ Fetching codes for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved 85 code record(s). #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved structure for 1 substance(s). #> ℹ Fetching hierarchy for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved 38 hierarchy node(s).   if (!is.null(out)) {     print(out$substance)     print(head(out$names))     print(head(out$codes))     print(out$structure[, what: Browse all substance records in GSRS — gsrs_browse
title: Browse all substance records in GSRS — gsrs_browse
text: Retrieves paginated list substance records GET /api/v1/substances. Useful bulk workflows building local catalogue. Use top skip page ~170,000 available records, set top = Inf fetch (slow — use care).

title: Browse all substance records in GSRS — gsrs_browse
code: gsrs_browse(top = 10L, skip = 0L, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Browse all substance records in GSRS — gsrs_browse
text: top Integer. Maximum number records return per request. Default 10. Set NULL Inf fetch records (paginates automatically; large result sets slow). skip Integer. Number records skip (offset). Default 0. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait paginated requests top = Inf. Default 0.5.

title: Browse all substance records in GSRS — gsrs_browse
text: data frame columns gsrs_search(). Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Browse all substance records in GSRS — gsrs_browse
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   # Fetch the first 5 substance records   out <- gsrs_browse(top = 5, verbose = FALSE)   if (!is.null(out)) print(out[, c("approval_id", "preferred_name",                                     "substance_class")]) #>   approval_id #> 1  B71UA545DE #> 2  5Y3NBK9IS7 #> 3  535OQ68DO6 #> 4  76RAN2WN7T #> 5  12XH8EKL2A #>                                                                                                                         preferred_name #> 1                                                                                                                 CYNARA SCOLYMUS LEAF #> 2                                                                                                         PHENANTHRO(4,5-BCD)THIOPHENE #> 3                                                                                                                  GARCINIA COWA LATEX #> 4 Ethyl (6bR,10aS)-2,3,6b,9,10,10a-hexahydro-3-methyl-1H-pyrido[3′,4′:4,5]pyrrolo[1,2,3-de]quinoxaline-8(7H)-carboxylate hydrochloride #> 5                                                                                                                             MGS-0210 #>       substance_class #> 1 structurallyDiverse #> 2            chemical #> 3 structurallyDiverse #> 4            chemical #> 5            chemical # }

what: Retrieve chemical structure information by substance name or CAS number — gsrs_chem_info
title: Retrieve chemical structure information by substance name or CAS number — gsrs_chem_info
text: convenience wrapper resolves one substance identifiers GSRS UNIIs fetches embedded chemical structure data substance. result one wide row per input identifier containing resolved metadata full structure record.

title: Retrieve chemical structure information by substance name or CAS number — gsrs_chem_info
code: gsrs_chem_info(   identifiers,   type = c("name", "cas", "unii", "inchikey", "smiles"),   verbose = TRUE,   delay = 0.5 )

title: Retrieve chemical structure information by substance name or CAS number — gsrs_chem_info
text: identifiers Character vector substance identifiers. type Character scalar. identifier type. One : "name" Common systematic substance name (default). "cas" CAS Registry Number (e.g., "50-78-2"). "unii" FDA UNII / approval ID (e.g., "R16CO5Y76E"). Skips search step fetches structure directly. "inchikey" Standard InChIKey (e.g., "BSYNRYMUTXBXSQ-UHFFFAOYSA-N"). "smiles" SMILES string. Uses exact structure search resolve UNII fetching structure record. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual API calls. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve chemical structure information by substance name or CAS number — gsrs_chem_info
text: data frame one row per input identifier columns: query identifier supplied caller. type identifier type ("name" "cas"). unii Resolved UNII / approval ID. preferred_name Preferred display name GSRS. substance_class Substance class (e.g., "chemical"). smiles Canonical SMILES string. formula Molecular formula (e.g., "C9H8O4"). mwt Molecular weight (numeric). inchi_key Standard InChIKey. inchi Full InChI string. stereochemistry Stereochemistry descriptor. optical_activity Optical activity descriptor. charge Formal charge (integer). stereo_centers Number stereocenters. defined_stereo Number defined stereocenters. ez_centers Number E/Z double-bond stereocenters. molfile MDL molfile string. date_retrieved Date structure response received. Unresolved identifiers non-chemical substances produce row NAs query type set. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve chemical structure information by substance name or CAS number — gsrs_chem_info
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_chem_info(c("aspirin", "ibuprofen"), type = "name") #> ℹ Resolving name: aspirin ... #> ℹ Resolving name: ibuprofen ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: RM1CE97Z4N ... #> ✔ Retrieved chemical info for 2 substance(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(out[, c("query", "unii", "formula", "mwt")]) #>       query       unii          formula      mwt #> 1   aspirin R16CO5Y76E           C9H8O4 180.1578 #> 2 ibuprofen RM1CE97Z4N C13H17O2.Na.2H2O 264.2937    Sys.sleep(2)   out_cas <- gsrs_chem_info(c("50-78-2", "15687-27-1"), type = "cas") #> ℹ Resolving CAS: 50-78-2 ... #> ℹ Resolving CAS: 15687-27-1 ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: WK2XYI10QM ... #> ✔ Retrieved chemical info for 2 substance(s).   if (!is.null(out_cas)) print(out_cas[, c("query", "unii", "formula", "mwt")]) #>        query       unii  formula      mwt #> 1    50-78-2 R16CO5Y76E   C9H8O4 180.1578 #> 2 15687-27-1 WK2XYI10QM C13H18O2 206.2813    Sys.sleep(2)   out_unii <- gsrs_chem_info("R16CO5Y76E", type = "unii") #> ℹ Using UNII directly: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ✔ Retrieved chemical info for 1 substance(s).   if (!is.null(out_unii)) print(out_unii[, c("query", "formula", "mwt")]) #>        query formula      mwt #> 1 R16CO5Y76E  C9H8O4 180.1578    Sys.sleep(2)   out_ik <- gsrs_chem_info("BSYNRYMUTXBXSQ-UHFFFAOYSA-N", type = "inchikey") #> ℹ Resolving InChIKey: BSYNRYMUTXBXSQ-UHFFFAOYSA-N ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ✔ Retrieved chemical info for 1 substance(s).   if (!is.null(out_ik)) print(out_ik[, c("query", "unii", "formula")]) #>                         query       unii formula #> 1 BSYNRYMUTXBXSQ-UHFFFAOYSA-N R16CO5Y76E  C9H8O4    Sys.sleep(2)   out_smi <- gsrs_chem_info("CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O", type = "smiles") #> ℹ Resolving SMILES (exact): CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O ... #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ✔ Retrieved chemical info for 1 substance(s).   if (!is.null(out_smi)) print(out_smi[, c("query", "unii", "formula")]) #>                   query       unii formula #> 1 CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O R16CO5Y76E  C9H8O4 # }

what: Retrieve external codes and identifiers for GSRS substances — gsrs_codes
title: Retrieve external codes and identifiers for GSRS substances — gsrs_codes
text: supplied UNII, calls GET /api/v1/substances(<UNII>)/codes returns registered cross-references tidy data frame. include CAS numbers, PubChem CIDs, ChEMBL IDs, -ATC codes, NDF-RT codes, DrugBank IDs, many .

title: Retrieve external codes and identifiers for GSRS substances — gsrs_codes
code: gsrs_codes(unii, code_system = NULL, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Retrieve external codes and identifiers for GSRS substances — gsrs_codes
text: unii Character vector one UNII codes. code_system Character vector code systems filter (e.g., c("CAS", "PUBCHEM")). Case-insensitive matching. Pass NULL (default) return code systems. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups unii multiple entries. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve external codes and identifiers for GSRS substances — gsrs_codes
text: data frame columns: code_system External database / code system name (e.g., "CAS", "PUBCHEM", "ChEMBL", "-ATC"). code identifier system. type "PRIMARY" "ALTERNATIVE". url URL external record (available). comments Additional context code (e.g., ATC path). is_classification Logical; TRUE classification codes. uuid Internal GSRS UUID code record. date_retrieved Date response received. query UNII supplied caller. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve external codes and identifiers for GSRS substances — gsrs_codes
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   # All codes for aspirin   out <- gsrs_codes("R16CO5Y76E") #> ℹ Fetching codes for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved 85 code record(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(head(out)) #>   code_system          code    type #> 1     WHO-ATC       C07FX02 PRIMARY #> 2   DRUG BANK       DB00945 PRIMARY #> 3 RS_ITEM_NUM       1044006 PRIMARY #> 4         CFR 21 CFR http://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cdrh/cfdocs/cfCFR/CFRSearch.cfm?fr=343.12 #> 6      http://www.whocc.no/atcvet/atcvet_index/?code=QN02BA51&showdescription=yes #> SYSTEM|BETA BLOCKING AGENTS|BETA BLOCKING AGENTS, OTHER COMBINATIONS|Beta blocking agents, other combinations|sotalol and acetylsalicylic acid #> 2 PRODUCTS FOR OVER-THE-COUNTER HUMAN USE|Subpart B--Active Ingredients|Sec. 343.13 Rheumatologic active ingredients. #> 5 PART 343 -- INTERNAL ANALGESIC, ANTIPYRETIC, AND ANTIRHEUMATIC DRUG PRODUCTS FOR OVER-THE-COUNTER HUMAN USE|Subpart B--Active Ingredients|Sec. 343.12 Cardiovascular active ingredients. #> 6                                                  VATC|ANALGESICS|OTHER ANALGESICS AND ANTIPYRETICS|Salicylic acid and derivatives|acetylsalicylic acid, combinations excl. psycholeptics #>   is_classification                                 uuid      date_retrieved #> 1 what: Retrieve the relationship hierarchy for GSRS substances — gsrs_hierarchy
title: Retrieve the relationship hierarchy for GSRS substances — gsrs_hierarchy
text: supplied UNII, calls GET /api/v1/substances(<UNII>)/@hierarchy returns flat parent/child relationship tree tidy data frame. useful navigating relationships salt forms free base, active metabolites, component substances.

title: Retrieve the relationship hierarchy for GSRS substances — gsrs_hierarchy
code: gsrs_hierarchy(unii, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Retrieve the relationship hierarchy for GSRS substances — gsrs_hierarchy
text: unii Character vector one UNII codes. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups unii multiple entries. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve the relationship hierarchy for GSRS substances — gsrs_hierarchy
text: data frame columns: node_id Node identifier within hierarchy tree (string index). parent_id Parent node identifier ("#" root nodes). depth Depth tree (0 = root). type Node type (e.g., "ROOT", "ACTIVE MOIETY", "SALT/SOLVATE"). text Human-readable label including UNII name. expandable Logical; TRUE node children. approval_id UNII substance node. name Preferred name node. ref_uuid Internal GSRS UUID related substance. substance_class Substance class node. deprecated Logical; TRUE node substance deprecated. date_retrieved Date response received. query UNII supplied caller. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve the relationship hierarchy for GSRS substances — gsrs_hierarchy
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_hierarchy("R16CO5Y76E")  # aspirin #> ℹ Fetching hierarchy for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved 38 hierarchy node(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(out[, c("depth", "type", "approval_id", "name")]) #>    depth                        type approval_id #> 1      0                        ROOT  R16CO5Y76E #> 2      1 HAS ACTIVE MOIETY:"Aspirin" what: Retrieve all names (synonyms) for GSRS substances — gsrs_names
title: Retrieve all names (synonyms) for GSRS substances — gsrs_names
text: supplied UNII, calls GET /api/v1/substances(<UNII>)/names returns every registered name record tidy data frame row.

title: Retrieve all names (synonyms) for GSRS substances — gsrs_names
code: gsrs_names(unii, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Retrieve all names (synonyms) for GSRS substances — gsrs_names
text: unii Character vector one UNII codes. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups unii multiple entries. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve all names (synonyms) for GSRS substances — gsrs_names
text: data frame columns: name name string. std_name Standardised (uppercased) name. type Name type code (e.g., "bn" brand name, "cn" common name, "sys" systematic name, "" official name). preferred Logical; TRUE preferred name. display_name Logical; TRUE name shown default. languages Semicolon-separated language codes. domains Semicolon-separated domain tags. uuid Internal GSRS UUID name record. date_retrieved Date response received. query UNII supplied caller. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve all names (synonyms) for GSRS substances — gsrs_names
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_names("R16CO5Y76E")  # aspirin #> ℹ Fetching names for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved 64 name record(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(head(out)) #>                              name                        std_name type #> 1       2-(ACETYLOXY)BENZOIC ACID       2-(ACETYLOXY)BENZOIC ACID  sys #> 2         2-ACETYLOXYBENZOIC ACID         2-ACETYLOXYBENZOIC ACID  sys #> 3               ACETYL SALICYLATE               ACETYL SALICYLATE  sys #> 4            ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID            ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID   of #> 5   ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID (WHO-IP)   ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID (WHO-IP)   cn #> 6 ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID [EMA EPAR] ACETYLSALICYLIC ACID [EMA EPAR]   cn #>   preferred display_name languages  domains #> 1     FALSE        FALSE        en          #> 2     FALSE        FALSE        en          #> 3     FALSE        FALSE        en          #> 4      TRUE        FALSE        en cosmetic #> 5     FALSE        FALSE        en          #> 6     FALSE        FALSE        en          #>                                   uuid      date_retrieved      query #> 1 c7069333-892e-4828-97aa-6ea06434cb34 2026-05-01 02:05:00 R16CO5Y76E #> 2 19144a23-5c43-4ad2-b894-761915330349 2026-05-01 02:05:00 R16CO5Y76E #> 3 17796a92-7d19-41dd-8a1d-85f7fc2602ac 2026-05-01 02:05:00 R16CO5Y76E #> 4 c5121134-4cd0-40ce-8d68-160951300713 2026-05-01 02:05:00 R16CO5Y76E #> 5 48d89039-025b-4fe5-bd9a-c9a876c49ae6 2026-05-01 02:05:00 R16CO5Y76E #> 6 31071e18-01f5-4fb8-9c99-336e1b4883e7 2026-05-01 02:05:00 R16CO5Y76E # }

what: Search the GSRS substance database — gsrs_search
title: Search the GSRS substance database — gsrs_search
text: Searches FDA Global Substance Registration System (GSRS) using free-text Lucene-style field query. Returns tidy data frame matching substance records key metadata fields.

title: Search the GSRS substance database — gsrs_search
code: gsrs_search(query, top = 10L, skip = 0L, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Search the GSRS substance database — gsrs_search
text: query Character string. search query. Supports: Free text (e.g., "aspirin") Lucene field syntax (e.g., "root_names:aspirin", "root_approvalID:R16CO5Y76E") Wildcards (*, ?) per GSRS documentation. top Integer. Maximum number records return per request. Default 10. Use NULL Inf attempt retrieve records (paginates automatically; large result sets may slow). skip Integer. Number records skip (offset). Default 0. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait paginated requests. Default 0.5.

title: Search the GSRS substance database — gsrs_search
text: data frame columns: uuid Internal GSRS UUID substance. approval_id FDA UNII / approval ID. preferred_name Preferred display name. substance_class Substance class (e.g., "chemical", "structurallyDiverse"). status Record status (e.g., "approved"). definition_type "PRIMARY" "ALTERNATIVE". definition_level "COMPLETE" "INCOMPLETE". version Record version string. names_url URL retrieve names substance. codes_url URL retrieve codes substance. self_url Full URL substance record. date_retrieved Date response received server. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Search the GSRS substance database — gsrs_search
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_search("aspirin", top = 5) #> ℹ Fetching records 1 - 5 ... #> ℹ Retrieved 5 record(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(head(out)) #>                                   uuid approval_id       preferred_name #> 1 a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248  R16CO5Y76E              Aspirin #> 2 39305c46-e2bd-4343-bdd3-8502874c9f1e  E33TS05V6B     ASPIRIN ALUMINUM #> 3 8919c8de-dccd-4d97-a4bc-82cd34a0616b  WOD7W0DGZS      Aspirin calcium #> 4 38cc8efd-e65b-4ea9-83be-b37cf3694c38  YR4ND62LYK Aspirin copper dimer #> 5 26fba4d9-e663-444a-84a6-c38fad3af682  T6EKB9V2O2           GUACETISAL #>   substance_class   status definition_type definition_level version #> 1        chemical approved         PRIMARY         COMPLETE     119 #> 2        chemical approved         PRIMARY         COMPLETE      16 #> 3        chemical approved         PRIMARY         COMPLETE      17 #> 4        chemical approved         PRIMARY         COMPLETE       8 #> 5        chemical approved         PRIMARY         COMPLETE      16 #>                                                                                  names_url #> 1 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248)/names #> 2 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(39305c46-e2bd-4343-bdd3-8502874c9f1e)/names #> 3 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(8919c8de-dccd-4d97-a4bc-82cd34a0616b)/names #> 4 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(38cc8efd-e65b-4ea9-83be-b37cf3694c38)/names #> 5 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(26fba4d9-e663-444a-84a6-c38fad3af682)/names #>                                                                                  codes_url #> 1 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248)/codes #> 2 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(39305c46-e2bd-4343-bdd3-8502874c9f1e)/codes #> 3 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(8919c8de-dccd-4d97-a4bc-82cd34a0616b)/codes #> 4 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(38cc8efd-e65b-4ea9-83be-b37cf3694c38)/codes #> 5 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(26fba4d9-e663-444a-84a6-c38fad3af682)/codes #>                                                                                       self_url #> 1 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248)?view=full #> 2 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(39305c46-e2bd-4343-bdd3-8502874c9f1e)?view=full #> 3 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(8919c8de-dccd-4d97-a4bc-82cd34a0616b)?view=full #> 4 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(38cc8efd-e65b-4ea9-83be-b37cf3694c38)?view=full #> 5 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(26fba4d9-e663-444a-84a6-c38fad3af682)?view=full #>        date_retrieved #> 1 2026-05-01 02:05:03 #> 2 2026-05-01 02:05:03 #> 3 2026-05-01 02:05:03 #> 4 2026-05-01 02:05:03 #> 5 2026-05-01 02:05:03 # }

what: Retrieve chemical structure data for GSRS substances — gsrs_structure
title: Retrieve chemical structure data for GSRS substances — gsrs_structure
text: supplied UNII, fetches full substance record GET /api/v1/substances(<UNII>) extracts embedded structure object, returning chemical identifiers properties tidy data frame.

title: Retrieve chemical structure data for GSRS substances — gsrs_structure
code: gsrs_structure(unii, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Retrieve chemical structure data for GSRS substances — gsrs_structure
text: unii Character vector one UNII codes. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups unii multiple entries. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve chemical structure data for GSRS substances — gsrs_structure
text: data frame columns: smiles Canonical SMILES string. formula Molecular formula (e.g., "C9H8O4"). mwt Molecular weight (numeric). inchi_key Standard InChIKey. inchi Full InChI string. stereochemistry Stereochemistry descriptor (e.g., "ACHIRAL", "RACEMIC", "ABSOLUTE"). optical_activity Optical activity (e.g., "UNSPECIFIED", "(+)", "(-)"). charge Formal charge (integer). stereo_centers Number stereocenters. defined_stereo Number defined stereocenters. ez_centers Number E/Z double-bond stereocenters. molfile MDL molfile string. date_retrieved Date response received. query UNII supplied caller. Non-chemical substances (proteins, polymers, etc.) return row NAs query set. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve chemical structure data for GSRS substances — gsrs_structure
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_structure("R16CO5Y76E")  # aspirin #> ℹ Fetching structure for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ... #> ℹ Retrieved structure for 1 substance(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(out[, c("smiles", "formula", "mwt", "inchi_key")]) #>                  smiles formula      mwt                   inchi_key #> 1 CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O  C9H8O4 180.1578 BSYNRYMUTXBXSQ-UHFFFAOYSA-N # }

what: Search GSRS by chemical structure — gsrs_structure_search
title: Search GSRS by chemical structure — gsrs_structure_search
text: Searches FDA Global Substance Registration System substances matching chemical structure query supplied SMILES string. Supports substructure, similarity, exact-match, flexible (disconnected moiety) search types.

title: Search GSRS by chemical structure — gsrs_structure_search
code: gsrs_structure_search(   smiles,   type = c("sub", "sim", "exact", "flex"),   cutoff = 0.8,   top = 10L,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Search GSRS by chemical structure — gsrs_structure_search
text: smiles Character string. valid SMILES SMARTS string describing query structure (e.g., "CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O" aspirin). type Character string. Search type. One : "sub" Substructure search (default). Returns substances whose structure contains query substructure. "sim" Similarity search. Returns substances Tanimoto similarity >= cutoff. Use cutoff control threshold. "exact" Exact structure match (tautomer-aware, stereo-sensitive). "flex" Flexible (disconnected moiety) search; stereo-insensitive. cutoff Numeric [0, 1]. Tanimoto similarity cutoff type = "sim". Default 0.8. Ignored search types. top Integer. Maximum number records return. Default 10. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE.

title: Search GSRS by chemical structure — gsrs_structure_search
text: data frame columns gsrs_search(), plus query_smiles column recording input SMILES. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Search GSRS by chemical structure — gsrs_structure_search
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   # Exact match for aspirin   out <- gsrs_structure_search("CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O", type = "exact") #> ℹ Running exact structure search for: CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O ... #> ℹ Retrieved 1 matching substance(s).   if (!is.null(out)) print(out[, c("approval_id", "preferred_name")]) #>   approval_id preferred_name #> 1  R16CO5Y76E        Aspirin    Sys.sleep(2)   # Similarity search   out_sim <- gsrs_structure_search("CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O",                                    type = "sim", cutoff = 0.7, top = 5) #> ℹ Running sim structure search for: CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O ... #> ℹ Retrieved 5 matching substance(s).   if (!is.null(out_sim)) print(out_sim[, c("approval_id", "preferred_name")]) #>   approval_id    preferred_name #> 1  R16CO5Y76E           Aspirin #> 2  6QT214X4XU         ALOXIPRIN #> 3  8649Y4P3PA      Zinc Aspirin #> 4  5XE48797BQ ASPIRIN POTASSIUM #> 5  E62HT5S2E9    Aspirin sodium # }

what: Fetch a GSRS substance record by UNII — gsrs_substance
title: Fetch a GSRS substance record by UNII — gsrs_substance
text: Retrieves top-level metadata single substance identified UNII (Unique Ingredient Identifier / approval ID). Internally performs filtered search using root_approvalID:<unii>.

title: Fetch a GSRS substance record by UNII — gsrs_substance
code: gsrs_substance(unii, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Fetch a GSRS substance record by UNII — gsrs_substance
text: unii Character vector one UNII codes (e.g., "R16CO5Y76E" aspirin). verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups unii multiple entries. Default 0.5.

title: Fetch a GSRS substance record by UNII — gsrs_substance
text: data frame columns gsrs_search(), one row per input UNII.  Rows unrecognised UNIIs contain NA except query column (always set input UNII).  Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Fetch a GSRS substance record by UNII — gsrs_substance
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_substance("R16CO5Y76E")  # aspirin #> ℹ Fetching substance for UNII: R16CO5Y76E ...   if (!is.null(out)) print(out) #>                                   uuid approval_id preferred_name #> 1 a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248  R16CO5Y76E        Aspirin #>   substance_class   status definition_type definition_level version #> 1        chemical approved         PRIMARY         COMPLETE     119 #>                                                                                  names_url #> 1 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248)/names #>                                                                                  codes_url #> 1 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248)/codes #>                                                                                       self_url #> 1 https://gsrs.ncats.nih.gov/api/v1/substances(a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248)?view=full #>        date_retrieved      query #> 1 2026-05-01 02:05:12 R16CO5Y76E # }

what: Look up UNII codes for substance names — gsrs_unii_from_name
title: Look up UNII codes for substance names — gsrs_unii_from_name
text: supplied name, queries GSRS using root_names:<name> returns best-matching UNII together preferred substance name substance class. useful converting common systematic names canonical FDA UNII identifier.

title: Look up UNII codes for substance names — gsrs_unii_from_name
code: gsrs_unii_from_name(names, top = 1L, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Look up UNII codes for substance names — gsrs_unii_from_name
text: names Character vector substance names resolve. top Integer. Maximum number candidate records consider per name query. Default 1 returns top hit. Increase inspect multiple candidates. verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait individual lookups. Default 0.5.

title: Look up UNII codes for substance names — gsrs_unii_from_name
text: data frame columns: unii UNII / approval ID matched substance. preferred_name Preferred display name GSRS. substance_class Substance class (e.g., "chemical"). status Record status. uuid Internal GSRS UUID. date_retrieved Date response received. query name supplied caller. Unresolved names produce row NAs query set. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Look up UNII codes for substance names — gsrs_unii_from_name
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   out <- gsrs_unii_from_name(c("aspirin", "ibuprofen")) #> ℹ Resolving name to UNII: aspirin ... #> ℹ Resolving name to UNII: ibuprofen ...   if (!is.null(out)) print(out) #>         unii   preferred_name substance_class   status #> 1 R16CO5Y76E          Aspirin        chemical approved #> 2 RM1CE97Z4N IBUPROFEN SODIUM        chemical approved #>                                   uuid      date_retrieved     query #> 1 a05ec20c-8fe2-4e02-ba7f-df69e5e30248 2026-05-01 02:05:15   aspirin #> 2 09826010-6401-4df0-8d1d-7be270a26512 2026-05-01 02:05:15 ibuprofen # }

what: Retrieve controlled vocabulary terms from GSRS — gsrs_vocabularies
title: Retrieve controlled vocabulary terms from GSRS — gsrs_vocabularies
text: Fetches (page ) controlled vocabulary entries GET /api/v1/vocabularies. result one row per vocabulary term, parent domain type attached every row. useful understanding allowed values fields name type, substance class, relationship type, code system, .

title: Retrieve controlled vocabulary terms from GSRS — gsrs_vocabularies
code: gsrs_vocabularies(top = NULL, verbose = TRUE, delay = 0.5)

title: Retrieve controlled vocabulary terms from GSRS — gsrs_vocabularies
text: top Integer. Maximum number vocabulary domains return per request. Default NULL fetches domains (paginates automatically). verbose Logical. TRUE, emit progress messages. Default TRUE. delay Numeric. Seconds wait paginated requests. Default 0.5.

title: Retrieve controlled vocabulary terms from GSRS — gsrs_vocabularies
text: data frame columns: domain Vocabulary domain name (e.g., "NAME_TYPE", "SUBSTANCE_CLASS", "RELATIONSHIP_TYPE"). term_type Vocabulary term type identifier. editable Logical; TRUE vocabulary can extended. filterable Logical; TRUE vocabulary supports filtering. value controlled term value (used API/data). display Human-readable display label term. hidden Logical; TRUE term hidden UI. selected Logical; TRUE term selected default. date_retrieved Date response received. Returns NULL error (warning).

title: Retrieve controlled vocabulary terms from GSRS — gsrs_vocabularies
code: # \donttest{   Sys.sleep(2)   vocab <- gsrs_vocabularies(verbose = FALSE)   if (!is.null(vocab)) {     # See all name type values     print(vocab[vocab$domain == "NAME_TYPE", c("value", "display")])   } #>     value         display #> 911    of   Official Name #> 912   sys Systematic Name #> 913    bn      Brand Name #> 914    cn     Common Name #> 915    cd            Code # }

title: rgsrs 0.1.0
text: gsrs_search(): free-text Lucene-syntax search across GSRS substances, optional automatic pagination. gsrs_substance(): fetch substance metadata UNII (vectorized). gsrs_names(): retrieve registered names / synonyms one UNIIs. gsrs_codes(): retrieve cross-reference codes (CAS, PubChem, ChEMBL, -ATC, DrugBank, etc.) one UNIIs, optional code_system filter. gsrs_unii_from_name(): resolve substance names UNII identifiers. gsrs_structure(): fetch chemical structure data (SMILES, formula, MW, InChI, stereo info) UNII. gsrs_structure_search(): substructure, similarity, exact, flexible structure search SMILES. gsrs_chem_info(): retrieve chemical structure information identifier — name, CAS, UNII, InChIKey, SMILES. gsrs_hierarchy(): retrieve parent/child relationship tree substance. gsrs_browse(): page full GSRS substance catalogue. gsrs_vocabularies(): retrieve controlled vocabulary terms. gsrs_all(): convenience umbrella returning substance metadata, names, codes, structure, hierarchy single named list. write_dataframes_to_excel(): write named list data frames Excel workbook (requires openxlsx).
